info.name: GitHub Profile Analyzer API
info.description:
A collection of API endpoints for the GitHub Profile Analyzer service. Fetches GitHub user data, computes insights, and stores them in MySQL.

**Base URL**: `{{base_url}}`

**Setup**: Set the `base_url` variable to your server URL (e.g., `http://localhost:3000`).

request.description: Check if the API server is running properly.

response.name: Success

request.description: Fetches the GitHub profile data for the specified username, computes insights (total stars, forks, most used language, top repos), and stores or updates the record in MySQL. Re-running this endpoint on the same username refreshes the stored data.

response.name: Success - Profile Analyzed
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile for 'torvalds' analyzed and stored successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "username": "torvalds",
    "name": "Linus Torvalds",
    "bio": null,
    "location": "Portland, OR",
    "email": null,
    "blog": null,
    "company": "Linux Foundation",
    "avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1024025?v=4",
    "github_url": "https://github.com/torvalds",
    "public_repos": 7,
    "public_gists": 0,
    "followers": 230000,
    "following": 0,
    "total_stars": 190000,
    "total_forks": 55000,
    "most_used_language": "C",
    "top_repos": [
      {
        "name": "linux",
        "description": "Linux kernel source tree",
        "url": "https://github.com/torvalds/linux",
        "stars": 185000,
        "forks": 52000,
        "language": "C",
        "topics": []
      }
    ],
    "account_created_at": "2011-09-03T15:26:22.000Z",
    "last_analyzed_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

response.name: Error - Rate Limit

request.description: Analyze GitHub's official octocat demo account.

query.description: Sort field: followers | total_stars | public_repos | last_analyzed_at | created_at

request.description: Retrieve all analyzed GitHub profiles with pagination and sorting support. Returns a summary view (no top_repos JSON for brevity).
Retrieve the full stored insights for a specific GitHub username. Returns the complete record including top_repos JSON.

response.name: Success - Profile Found
response.body:

request.description: Delete a stored GitHub profile from the database by username.
